chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3552 of 2010 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.7512/2021. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 3. For hearing of CMA No.30502/2014. 4. For hearing of CMA No.30503/2014. 07.02.2025 Mrs. Navin Merchant, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Petition is pending since 2010 and prima facie inquiry assessment order has been challenged. While the same is assailable in statutory hierarchy. No case could be articulated for direct recourse to writ jurisdiction in the presence of adequate remedy having been provided under the law. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
